'''Cloud City Control''' was the primary [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] stationed in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

==History==
The [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Wing Guard]] comprised the largest segment of Cloud City Control.

Cloud City Control [[Officer/Legends|officers]] were tasked with maintaining security in the [[City/Legends|city]], as well as normal duties of traffic control and public safety. They also maintained watch over local [[Realspace/Legends|space]] around [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] to ward off potential attacks to the city, and to dissuade [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas poachers.
